data.description: Company NOG releases Q1 2026 financials.

CANADA'S FEDERAL DEBT-TO-GDP RATIO IS PROJECTED AT 41.1% FOR 2025/26 (DOWN FROM 42.4% IN NOVEMBER), 41.5% FOR 2026/27 (VS 43.1%), AND 41.8% FOR 2027/28 (VS 43.3%), BEFORE REMAINING LARGELY STEADY THROUGH 2029/30 — STATEMENT.

data.title: Highwoods Announces Availability of First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - On April 28, 2026, Highwoods Properties, Inc. (NYSE:HIW) announced their first quarter 2026 results. The report can be accessed through the investors section of their website, www.highwoods.com, or by clicking on the provided link.

data.title: American Assets Trust, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Diego, American Assets Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AAT) shared its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Stride reports third quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: Reston, Virginia - On April 28, 2026, Stride, Inc. (LRN), a prominent technology-driven education firm, disclosed their fiscal year 2026 third-quarter performance, concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: ARI) shared its financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: First Community Bankshares, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results and Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Bluefield, Va., on April 28, 2026, First Community Bankshares, Inc. revealed its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, listed as NASDAQ: FCBC and operating through www.firstcommunitybank.com, disclosed a net income of $12.03 million, equivalent to $0.63 per diluted common share, for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Adjusting for expenses related to the acquisition of Hometown Bancshares, Inc, and one-time charges, the net income stood at $13.83 million, translating to $0.73 per diluted common share.

data.title: Lumexa Imaging Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call Date
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Lumexa Imaging, a major provider of outpatient imaging services, stated it will reveal its first quarter 2026 financial and operational outcomes post-market closure on May 12, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. Lumexa Imaging, listed as NASDAQ: LMRI, is a significant player in the industry.
Net income for Q1 2026 at ONEOK rises by 12%, with adjusted EBITDA also up by 13%.

data.title: Orange County Bancorp, Inc. Announces Record First Quarter Earnings:
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Middletown, NY-based Orange County Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBT), the parent company of Orange Bank & Trust Co. and Orange Investment Advisors, Inc., reported a net income of $11.3 million for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. This translates to earnings of $0.85 per basic and diluted share. This marks an improvement from the $8.7 million in net income, equivalent to $0.77 per basic and diluted share, reported for the same quarter in 2025. The rise in earnings per share was primarily driven by an increase in net interest income, along with a decrease in provision for credit losses, although partially offset by a rise in noninterest expense during this period.

data.title: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. Announces Cash Distribution of $0.06 per Unit
data.description: In Piraeus, Greece on April 28, 2026, Navios Maritime Partners L.P. disclosed a financial update without indicating the source. The company's Board of Directors declared a cash distribution of $0.06 per unit for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. This amount signifies a considerable 20% boost from the previous quarter's distribution. Annually, this distribution translates to $0.24 per unit for investors.

data.title: NXP Semiconductors Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: NXP Semiconductors N.V. announced their financial results for the first quarter ending on March 29, 2026, from Eindhoven, The Netherlands. The company, listed as NXPI on NASDAQ, reported a quarterly revenue of $3.18 billion, marking a significant 12% increase compared to the previous year. This growth was attributed to improvements across all focus end markets, particularly in industrial and automotive processing. The company's strategic growth drivers played a crucial role in this success. Rafael Sotomayor, the President and CEO of NXP, expressed confidence in their continual progress throughout 2026, expecting further acceleration. He emphasized the company's dedication to smart investment, margin enhancement, and portfolio optimization to ensure ongoing value for their shareholders.

data.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Salt Lake City, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR), a prominent self-storage facility owner and operator in the United States and part of the S&P 500 index, disclosed its operational performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. shared its financial performance for Q1 2026, revealing a GAAP net income of $4.8 million (or $0.03 per share) for common stockholders. Additionally, Distributable Earnings stood at $15.6 million (equivalent to $0.12 per share), while Adjusted Distributable Earnings were reported at $18.2 million ($0.14 per share). The Company also disclosed its GAAP net book value during the period.

data.title: Carlisle Companies Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, the Board of Directors of Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) announced a dividend of $1.10 per share. This dividend will be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 18, 2026. Carlisle Companies Inc. is known for its innovative building envelope products focusing on energy-efficient buildings. With a strong presence in the market, Carlisle Construction Material is one of its key building products divisions.

data.title: BXP Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: BXP, Inc. (NYSE: BXP), the leading developer, owner, and manager of premium workplaces in the US, disclosed its first quarter results for 2026 today. In this quarter that concluded on March 31, 2026, the company experienced a 0.8% increase in revenue, reaching $872.1 million in comparison to $865.2 million recorded in the same period in 2025. The net income attributable to BXP, Inc. stood at $101.6 million for this quarter, translating to $0.64 per diluted share (EPS).

data.title: Mastercard to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In Purchase, New York, Mastercard (NYSE: MA) shared news about its involvement in two upcoming investor conferences in May.

data.title: F5 Adds Anand Eswaran to its Board of Directors
data.description: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) based in Seattle, recently appointed Anand Eswaran to its board of directors. Eswaran, known for his executive background in pioneering software firms, joined the board on April 24, 2026. He will contribute his expertise to F5’s Audit and Talent and Compensation Committees. Anand's addition emphasizes F5's strategic focus on tech leadership.

data.title: Ford Motor Company Board Declares Dividend for Second-Quarter 2026
data.description: Ford Motor Company, headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, announced a regular dividend for the second quarter of 15 cents per share for its common and Class B stock. Shareholders of record as of May 12 will receive the dividend on June 1. Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) is a global corporation focused on creating a more accessible world where mobility and individual pursuits are encouraged.

data.title: AI startup Ineffable Intelligence, founded by a Google DeepMind veteran, secures $1.1B for human-data-free AI development.
data.description: In the race towards superintelligence, Ineffable Intelligence is placing its bets on reinforcement learning instead of AI's extensive language models. This strategic decision highlights a shift towards prioritizing advanced learning techniques over language-centric models. These advancements in reinforcement learning hold the potential to propel AI to unprecedented levels of intelligence, setting the stage for groundbreaking developments in the field. This decision underscores the growing importance of innovative approaches in driving the future of AI, with Ineffable Intelligence leading the way in this dynamic landscape.
